Text:
With four days to go, here is a quick look at the dark beer selection coming to the festival this year.

Moor are bringing Old Freddy Walker. The Kernel are pouring two of their porters, Running Porter and London Porter. Abbeydale round out the lineup with their Dark Chocolate & Raspberry Stout, a flavoured option for those who want something a little different.

A small but considered selection from three respected names. Find them across the bars on Thursday, Friday and Saturday.

Advance tickets are on sale now:
https://hitchinbeerciderfestival.org.uk/

4th to 6th June 2026
King George V Playing Fields, Old Hale Way, Hitchin, SG5 1XL

#HitchinBeerFestival #HBCF2026 #RealAle #DarkBeer #Porter #Stout #CAMRA #Hitchin #NorthHerts #Hertfordshire #SupportLocal #CommunityEvent

In partnership with CAMRA North Hertfordshire and Hitchin Rugby Club.
